## Which process document do you want to update?

<new document>

## Summary of New Content

Create a comprehensive README.md for the docs/ folder that:
- Provides a brief summary of the OctoAcme project management processes
- Contains organized links to all process documentation files
- Serves as the entry point for anyone seeking guidance on project execution at OctoAcme
- Follows the existing documentation structure and style

## Why is this update needed?

Currently, process documentation is scattered across multiple files in the docs/ folder with no central index or summary. A README will:
- Improve discoverability of process documents
- Reduce onboarding time for new team members
- Provide a quick reference guide to all available processes
- Establish a single source of truth for project management guidance
- Support the Copilot Spaces knowledge base structure

## Suggested Content

The README should include:

### Structure
1. **Header**: Brief introduction to OctoAcme project management
2. **Quick Overview**: High-level summary of the project lifecycle (Initiation → Planning → Execution → Release → Retrospective)
3. **Core Principles**: Summary of key principles (customer-first, iterative delivery, clear ownership, data-informed, psychological safety)
4. **Process Documentation Links** (organized by phase):
   - **Project Initiation**: [octoacme-project-initiation.md](docs/octoacme-project-initiation.md)
   - **Project Planning**: [octoacme-project-planning.md](docs/octoacme-project-planning.md)
   - **Execution & Tracking**: [octoacme-execution-and-tracking.md](docs/octoacme-execution-and-tracking.md)
   - **Risks & Communication**: [octoacme-risks-and-communication.md](docs/octoacme-risks-and-communication.md)
   - **Release & Deployment**: [octoacme-release-and-deployment.md](docs/octoacme-release-and-deployment.md)
   - **Retrospective & Continuous Improvement**: [octoacme-retrospective-and-continuous-improvement.md](docs/octoacme-retrospective-and-continuous-improvement.md)
   - **Reference**: [octoacme-roles-and-personas.md](docs/octoacme-roles-and-personas.md)
   - **Overview**: [octoacme-project-management-overview.md](docs/octoacme-project-management-overview.md)
5. **Key Roles**: Brief summary of PM, PdM, Developers, QA, Stakeholders
6. **Getting Started**: Guidance on how to use these docs based on role or need

## Acceptance Criteria

- [x] Content aligns with existing process docs
- [x] Update improves clarity or closes a documented gap
- [x] Proposed content has been reviewed with stakeholders (if needed)
